{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260324005632217F6B51B409A4FCF66B"}"},"total":2395},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7174359418576880424","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"精品，一看就知道作者大大，一定去研究过所以剧本，剧情流畅，内容丰富，人物形象精彩完美，杀伐果断，爽，自己不行，别整天。怨天怨地，弱肉强食，从来都不会因为世界改变而改变，强者永远享受最好的一切。","text_exts":[{"e":47,"s":43,"text":"杀伐果断","tp":4,"uri":"dragon1967://search?source=44&hyperlink_type=quote_book&directQueryWord=%E6%9D%80%E4%BC%90%E6%9E%9C%E6%96%AD&directSearchSourceId=cmt_link%231774284993A4FCF66B%230%23%23&directTabType=0&reportDict=%7B%22comment_id%22%3A%227174359418576880424%22%2C%22enter_from_book_id%22%3A%227103838602630532111%22%2C%22hyperlink_position%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%2C%22hyperlink_type%22%3A%22quote_book%22%2C%22link_name%22%3A%22%E6%9D%80%E4%BC%90%E6%9E%9C%E6%96%AD%22%2C%22search_sec_entrance%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%7D&halfscreen=false"}]},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1670410770,"group_id":"7103838602630532111","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"冥王看透了善良的伪装
狮王看透了无力的痛苦
蝠王看透了强弱的转换
鲸鲨看透了欲望的无尽
蝎王看透了灵魂的本性","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N6R5Q0ih3ERYtjXI0a0KuglnH/Mmwf+Wm6trxHgKKnXk","gender":2,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":2,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/a756a524041847b4ad5d2fd8e7c8b670~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776873981&x-signature=RY88FNfrsVX4QQ0oAD%2FQBsXUb8g%3D","user_id":"4472447577359512","user_name":"太阳系漫游者"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"4472447577359512","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"sticker":{"expire_time":1772189362,"is_worn":true,"sticker":{"add_context":"","bg_color":"#FFF3DD","can_worn":false,"id":2,"name":"永不书荒","small_url":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/2c704b96a929a7a8b3461ddbf49a8d01","sticker_type":1,"url":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/b93ef223f8131d9ee8e8312f642d9681"}},"user_title_info":[{"en_title":"author","intro":"{"title_name":"作家","title_id":"author"}","is_author_title":true,"is_vip_title":false,"label":"{"title_text":"作家","title_default_color":"#FFFFFF","title_dark_color":"#FFFFFF","bg_default_color":"{\"start\":\"#FF9F31\",\"end\":\"#FFB95C\"}","bg_dark_color":"{\"start\":\"#CC8029\",\"end\":\"#CC9349\"}","title_dark_diaphaneity":"CC"}","zh_title":"作家"}]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7103838602630532111","book_info":{"abstract":"【特工】【神豪】【世界顶级电影穿越】【爽文】【战神】电视台小司机林跃，偶然间获得影视穿越系统，进入世界顶级影视中体验不一样的精彩人生，获得的奖励让他在现实世界实现逆袭。
《速度与激情》里他成就赛车神话，万众瞩目；
《流浪地球》里他成为末日之王；
《战狼》中他是天朝特种兵，扬国神威；
《飓风营救》中他是让人闻风丧胆的特工，让整个黑暗势力土崩瓦解；
《死亡飞车》里他是囚徒之王，斗车场上的魔鬼；
《生化危机》里他是天朝特工，深入地狱的战神；
釜山行的丧尸围城、指环王的魔幻之旅、复仇者们的顶礼膜拜、阿凡达中的骑龙之战、泰坦尼克号的感人之恋、生化危机中的无敌战神、环太平洋中的天朝崛起……
终于有一天，当电影世界开始苏醒，全球震惊：
速激多米尼克：我来天朝找我老大林跃，他是我唯一佩服的男人！
哈利波特赫敏：林跃，你要老婆不要？
灭霸：林跃，求求你做个人吧！
来吧，带你进入顶级影视世界，感受不一样的精彩人生，没看过影视的不影响看书。","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/5e5a42150454b0fa84303c8c45556b84","author":"寒江飞雪","author_id":"","book_id":"7103838602630532111","book_name":"老司机进电影：开局速激惊呆米娅","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#181018","creation_status":"0","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"1.3万人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":1016,"name":"男频衍生","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=1016&name=男频衍生&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":37,"name":"穿越","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=37&name=穿越&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":19,"name":"系统","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=19&name=系统&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":27,"name":"战神赘婿","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=27&name=战神赘婿&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":20,"name":"神豪","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=20&name=神豪&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":71,"name":"诸天万界","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=71&name=诸天万界&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":91,"name":"多女主","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=91&name=多女主&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":375,"name":"特种兵","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=375&name=特种兵&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":384,"name":"无敌","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=384&name=无敌&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":453,"name":"开局","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=453&name=开局&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":538,"name":"同人","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=538&name=同人&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":850,"name":"无脑爽","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=850&name=无脑爽&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":1079,"name":"衍生","schema":"dragon1967://ne
